<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs small and focused. -->

## Summary
<!-- What does this change and why? -->

Closes #

## Type
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / tool
- [ ] Node compatibility (transport/parser)
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Testing
<!-- What did you run? -->
- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `mypy src`
- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] Extended `tests/test_integration_mock.py` (if transport/parser behaviour changed)

## Checklist
- [ ] No secrets committed (no real passwords; callsigns/hosts/IPs are placeholders)
- [ ] State-changing commands go through the `safety.py` confirm gate
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] Docs updated (README / DESIGN / CONTRIBUTING) if behaviour or config changed
